hero.heading: Every electrolyte mix is built for runners. This one's built for the weight room.
hero.subtext: 5 electrolytes. 1g taurine. 120mg magnesium. 0g sugar. Dosed for resistance training — not marathon sweat.

reframe.heading: Your training is different. Your hydration should be too.
reframe.subtext: Most electrolyte mixes are built for one type of athlete. Here's the problem with that.
reframe.enduranceBody: 500–1,000mg sodium. 11–21g sugar. 0mg magnesium. Designed to replace what you sweat out over hours of cardio. Great for a marathon. Wrong for a heavy squat session.
reframe.strengthBody: 234mg sodium. 0g sugar. 120mg magnesium for force output. 10mg zinc for recovery. 1g taurine for muscle performance. Every ingredient dosed for what actually happens in the weight room.
reframe.closing: Resistance training demands a different formula. This is it.

magnesium.title: Magnesium
magnesium.desc: The mineral behind every muscle contraction. Supports force output, energy production, and recovery. 120mg per serving — 32% of your daily value.

zinc.title: Zinc
zinc.desc: Drives protein synthesis and supports testosterone levels. 10mg per serving — 100% of your daily value.

taurine.title: Taurine
taurine.desc: The most abundant amino acid in skeletal muscle. 1,000mg to support contractile force, reduce oxidative stress, and delay fatigue during high-intensity sets.

showcase.productImageAlt: Impossible Powders electrolyte sachet for strength training

science.heading: Backed by research, not marketing
science.body: Every ingredient at a dose that matters. Every health claim authorised by the European Food Safety Authority. The complete formula validated by independent university research.
points: EFSA-authorised health claims on magnesium, zinc, and potassium
All minerals within EU Tolerable Upper Intake Levels — safe even at 2 servings per day
Independent university validation of the complete formula

footer.newsletterSub: Alerts, discounts, and training tips — no spam.
